title: Resource APIs, Pagination, Idempotency, and Concurrency Control · Execution Trace: Optimistic Concurrency Version
summary: A list endpoint skips and duplicates rows during concurrent writes, create retries duplicate charges, PATCH silently overwrites fields, and response schemas expose storage columns. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo optimistic concurrency version increment in stable resource and mutation consistency contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use version fields or validators with conditional updates, distinguish absence from conflict, and return current-state recovery information safely.
Scope and validate idempotency keys, bind request fingerprints, serialize first execution, persist terminal outcome, expire records, and reject mismatched replay.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Predict Optimistic Concurrency Version · Theory Optimistic Concurrency Version
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 5316 in a internal administrative API crossing two trust zones. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate optimistic version conflicts from valid idempotency replay; then replay the same operation key with different content and reject the mismatch. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use version fields or validators with conditional updates, distinguish absence from conflict, and return current-state recovery information safely.
